title: astragalus cryptanthus
intro: Astragalus cryptanthus, also known as the hidden root or milk vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which allow it to help the body adapt to stress and regulate the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus cryptanthus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as fatigue, colds, and flu. Astragalus cryptanthus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
